completed_tasks.name: --changed-only untracked files bug
completed_tasks.details: Include untracked (new) files in _allowed_changed_files. Clean-repo early-exit JSON now emits {changed_files:[], message, analysis_scope:'empty', _meta:{changed_only:true}} instead of status/no_changes fields.

completed_tasks.name: cache clear --all flag
completed_tasks.details: Added --all as canonical flag name. --include-ris kept as hidden backward-compat alias. Prompt and help updated.

completed_tasks.name: RIS cold-start validation block
completed_tasks.details: Added validation dict to cold-start output: spring_detected, controllers_found, endpoints_found, status (valid|incomplete_snapshot). When Spring detected but endpoints missing: status downgraded to cold_start_incomplete, stale=true.

completed_tasks.name: --env-map unhide
completed_tasks.details: Removed hidden=True from --env-map option. Now visible in CLI help.

completed_tasks.name: fix-bug no-symptom warning
completed_tasks.details: When fix-bug runs without --symptom, emits warning to stderr: 'Results are significantly better with --symptom.'

completed_tasks.name: generate-tests output split
completed_tasks.details: test_gaps now emitted as both untested_sources (canonical) + test_gaps (compat alias). Added existing_test_count field (count of test files found). TaskOutput gains existing_test_count: Optional[int] field.

completed_tasks.name: LQN-02 test fix
completed_tasks.details: Pre-existing failure. Updated assertion to accept 'persistent structural context' alongside old 'codebase context' strings.

human_actions_pending.context: Untracked since session 29. No action needed to unblock.

decisions.decision: cold_start_incomplete status when Spring detected but endpoints absent
decisions.rationale: cold_start_ready is misleading when a Spring repo has controllers but no endpoint index. Agents relying on this to skip warm will get incomplete context. incomplete downgrade forces them to call get_endpoints or rebuild.

decisions.decision: untested_sources emitted alongside test_gaps (not replacing it)
decisions.rationale: Breaking rename of test_gaps would break existing agent prompts. Emit both: agents can use untested_sources, old clients still see test_gaps.

decisions.decision: --all is the canonical flag for cache clear + RIS; --include-ris hidden compat
decisions.rationale: --all is more discoverable and consistent with other CLI tools. --include-ris kept to not break scripts.

next_action: Human: run bash /private/tmp/sync_to_pipx.sh from normal Terminal, then run E2E verification of all 1.33.x fixes. Then publish 1.33.4.
context_notes: Session 36: commit 6480eae = 1.33.4 (7 bugs fixed). 1655 tests pass, 3 skipped. LQN-02 pre-existing failure now fixed.
